contract_repair_log.summary: Owned-file extensions repaired Svelte -> React/TSX. App stack is React 19 + Vite + TypeScript per app/package.json; no Svelte dependency present. Refinement.json and spec module 10.14 are framework-agnostic, so this is a contract drafting error confined to file extensions and naming. Behavior, acceptance criteria, validator focus, and red-team controls are unchanged. Added explicit app/src/lib/ipc/steering.ts binding to owned_files (the parallel of app/src/lib/ipc/model_runtime.ts established by MT-068); the prior 'stores/steering.ts' was a Svelte-store convention that does not map to this codebase, replaced with the typed IPC binding and a colocated state pub/sub module if needed.

title: INF-3 Activation Steering UI (vector editor + intensity slider + layer picker)
goal: Steering vector editor in Inference Lab per AC-INFER-LAB-UI-TOGGLES: list of registered vectors with active-toggle, intensity slider, layer-index picker; capture-from-contrastive-prompts wizard; hidden when capabilities.supportsActivationSteering == false.
expected_diff_shape: New React/TSX components app/src/components/inference_lab/SteeringVectorEditor.tsx + ContrastiveCaptureWizard.tsx + InferenceLab.tsx parent + barrel index.ts; new IPC binding app/src/lib/ipc/steering.ts; matching vitest specs; visual playwright spec tests/visual/steering_vector_editor.spec.ts; App.tsx wired with inference-lab activeView union member + nav button + body branch; App.css styling for the new panel.
unblock_conditions: MT-068 IPC + MT-097 vector store merged.
implementation_notes: Per AC-INFER-LAB-UI-TOGGLES + AC-INFER-LAB-UI-AB-COMPARE. React/TSX components (see contract_repair_log). SteeringVectorEditor.tsx: list of registered vectors (name, layer, intensity, technique badge) loaded via kernel_model_runtime_steering_list_vectors; toggle to set active via kernel_model_runtime_steering_set_active; intensity slider -10..10 (per MT-065 SteeringVector clamp); layer-index picker (dropdown of 0..n_layers from model config); unregister button per vector. ContrastiveCaptureWizard.tsx: two text areas (positive prompts, negative prompts) accepting one prompt per line; [Capture activations] button calls kernel_model_runtime_steering_capture for both sets (positive then negative); computes difference vector (positive_mean - negative_mean) at chosen layer; [Save vector] persists via kernel_model_runtime_steering_register_vector with provenance.technique='RepE' and positivePrompts/negativePrompts populated; A/B compare preview is documented as 'requires live runtime' until MT-074 unblocks (steering_capture backend currently returns runtime-unavailable; UI surfaces the error string verbatim and disables the A/B compare path with a clear note). Hidden via capabilities.supportsActivationSteering==false (rendered as null in the panel; the Inference Lab parent still mounts so other technique panels can light up when their own capability gates pass). GLOBAL-PRODUCTION-005..009: wizard accepts raw explicit prompt text verbatim (no sanitisation, censoring, or moralizing in the UI); license tag picker (Permissive / SourceModelLicenseOnly / Restricted) mandatory at save time. Tauri IPC channels: kernel_model_runtime_capabilities, kernel_model_runtime_steering_list_vectors, kernel_model_runtime_steering_set_active, kernel_model_runtime_steering_unregister, kernel_model_runtime_steering_capture, kernel_model_runtime_steering_register_vector (all camelCase payloads per Tauri 2 convention).
proof_commands: cd app && pnpm exec playwright test --grep steering_vector_editor
risk_if_missed: INF-3 UI knob missing; operator cannot create or apply steering vectors interactively.
validator_focus: Hidden when unsupported; A/B compare flow present; no UI-level sanitisation of operator-provided prompt text; license picker present.

proof.typecheck: PASS (cd app && pnpm run typecheck => exit 0)
proof.playwright: PASS 9/9 (cd app && pnpm exec playwright test --grep steering_vector_editor; 3 specs x 3 viewport projects)
proof.cargo_test_handshake_core: PENDING (running in background at completion-receipt time; results appended in follow-on STATUS receipt)

minimum_controls: No UI-level text sanitisation (operator prompts go through verbatim per GLOBAL-PRODUCTION-005).
License tag picker mandatory at save.
